content: Lambda_hc(m) lies in ker(Act) for all 2048 residue masks, so sector-33 height corrections do not change the Act-dependent shell functional.
proof_role: removes hidden finite obstruction from Talagrand

content: Talagrand shell domination is reduced to the Act-visible Golay shell incidence channel.
proof_role: moves problem from A985 transport to shell polynomial / entropy problem

content: Small and medium support faces are bounded by the AM-GM edge-count sieve.
High-support contained block counts depend only on complement size; equal-on-support has strict negative tangent Hessian and subunit proper-boundary ratio.
proof_role: reduces high boundary to global-on-face uniqueness

content: External fields can have local eta above 2/w far below the ratio barrier.
Every positive interior maximizer is equal; high-local-eta regions cannot reach ratio one.
